summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (carved/engraved ivory Shayla text with floating animation in Header.tsx and index.css), REQ-2 (Canvas-based water-fill animation in WaterFillAnimation.tsx with wave effect and 60-second reset), and REQ-3 (Web Audio API chime in audioGenerator.ts synchronized with water reset). One concern is that index.css imports Google Fonts from a CDN, which was listed as a non-goal, but the Shayla-specific CSS keyframes and text styles appear to be implemented. The CSS content for the carved text styles (.shayla-text, .shayla-carved-text keyframes) is in the truncated portion of index.css, so it cannot be fully verified but is referenced in Header.tsx.

missing_requirements.requirement: The engraved effect is visible through layered text-shadow or SVG filter; ivory/cream warm-white tone; gentle vertical bob using CSS keyframes
missing_requirements.reason: The CSS classes 'shayla-text' and 'shayla-carved-text' are referenced in Header.tsx but their actual CSS definitions (text-shadow, color, keyframe animation) are in the truncated portion of index.css and cannot be fully verified from the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Google Fonts CDN imports for Cinzel font added to index.css
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states as a non-goal: 'Loading external fonts, textures, or audio files from a CDN'. The diff shows index.css imports 'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@700;900&display=swap' from Google Fonts CDN.
